title: Navigation Menu
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Navigation Menu primitive preserving model-owned value/open state, trigger/list keyboard navigation, link active state, portal, positioner, popup, viewport, content, icon, arrow, backdrop, transition, activation-direction, ARIA, and deterministic placement attributes.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Navigation Menu primitive preserving model-owned value/open state, trigger/list keyboard navigation, link active state, portal, positioner, popup, viewport, content, icon, arrow, backdrop, transition, activation-direction, ARIA, and deterministic placement attributes.

registry.reason: Navigation Menu reuses the local Preview Card side, align, transition, instant, command, and deterministic popup/viewport conventions.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, Dom, message, and keyboard event helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, Predicate, and Effect composition for serializable options and command helpers.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Navigation Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Navigation Menu primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Open state is derived from the model-owned active item value; trigger, list, link, backdrop, and Escape interactions emit typed value-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow and keeps Navigation Menu value/open state in the consuming model.

deviations.summary: Focus handoff and restoration are exposed as Commands instead of being hidden inside render helpers.
deviations.rationale: Navigation Menu side effects must stay at Foldkit's Command boundary. The installable view remains pure and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Positioner, popup, viewport, content, arrow, collision, activation-direction, and sizing surfaces are represented as deterministic attributes without DOM measurement, ResizeObserver, MutationObserver, or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured geometry and auto-sizing belong behind a shared runtime service, not inside an installable render helper.
